title: agoseris parviflora
intro: Agoseris parviflora, also known as smallflower agoseris or smallflower cactus agoseris, is a perennial plant species belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health issues, including wounds, fever, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Agoseris parviflora include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and aid in digestion, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Agoseris parviflora can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, allowing for various herbal preparations to be used for its medicinal and health benefits.
